title: Package-native Fig. 4: localization vs satellites
assumptions: Synthetic deterministic static geometry, not legacy TLE propagation.
All satellite downlinks and all directed sidelinks are available.
Clock offsets are sampled as range-domain equivalents of zero-mean Gaussian time offsets.
Refined JCLS fuses repeated independent measurement epochs over a fixed static geometry.
known_discrepancy_from_v24: Package-native provenance is intentionally not forced to match legacy notebook curves.
